# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: tools/codered_script_pipeline.py
# SHA1: 509e6e1ea771a3131fe04b6e70eadf837f539e19

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Code RED Script Pipeline lane.

Creates the unified scripting workflow target:

scan -> read -> open -> edit -> export decompiled/readable -> import/recompile queue

The lane is conservative by design:
- editable text/source files get safe edit copies and import/recompile queue entries
- compiled script binaries (.wsc/.csc/.xsc/.sco/.ysc) get full raw exports plus readable/pseudo-decompiled reports
- existing binary bytecode roundtrip is blocked until Windows compiler/decompiler proof exists
- new script templates are created as a bonus safe source lane
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import csv
import hashlib
import json
import os
import re
import shutil
import string
import subprocess
import sys
from collections import Counter
from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Iterable

VERSION = "1.0.0-script-pipeline"
DECODE_TOOL = Path("tools/codered_script_workshop_decode.py")
COMPILE_PREP_TOOL = Path("tools/codered_script_workshop_compile_prep.py")
DECODE_MANIFEST = Path("data/codered/script_workshop_decode_manifest.json")
COMPILE_MANIFEST = Path("data/codered/script_workshop_compile_candidates.json")
NATIVE_DB = Path("data/codered/native_database.json")
BRIDGE_MANIFEST = Path("data/codered/native_bridge_manifest.json")
PIPELINE_ROOT = Path("scratch/script_workshop_pipeline")
REPORT_JSON = Path("logs/CodeRED_Script_Pipeline_Report.json")
REPORT_MD = Path("logs/CodeRED_Script_Pipeline_Report.md")
PIPELINE_MANIFEST_JSON = Path("data/codered/script_pipeline_manifest.json")
PIPELINE_MANIFEST_CSV = Path("data/codered/script_pipeline_manifest.csv")
CAPABILITIES_JSON = Path("data/codered/script_pipeline_capabilities.json")
PASS_LOG = Path("logs/CodeRED_Script_Pipeline_Lane_Pass_2026-05-03.md")

TEXT_SUFFIXES = {".c", ".h", ".hpp", ".cpp", ".cc", ".cxx", ".py", ".bat", ".ps1", ".txt", ".md", ".xml", ".ini", ".csv", ".json"}
SOURCE_SUFFIXES = {".c", ".h", ".hpp", ".cpp", ".cc", ".cxx"}
COMPILED_SUFFIXES = {".wsc", ".csc", ".xsc", ".sco", ".ysc"}
HASH_RE = re.compile(r"0x[0-9A-Fa-f]{8,16}")
UPPER_TOKEN_RE = re.compile(r"\b[A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]{2,}\b")
ASCII_STRING_RE = re.compile(rb"[ -~]{4,}")
SAFE_NAME_RE = re.compile(r"[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+")


@dataclass
class PipelineRecord:
    path: str
    suffix: str
    size: int
    sha1: str
    pipeline_state: str
    read_export: str = ""
    raw_export: str = ""
    open_target: str = ""
    edit_copy: str = ""
    decompiled_export: str = ""
    import_queue_state: str = ""
    recompile_queue_state: str = ""
    native_hits: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    hash_hits: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    strings_preview: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    warnings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class Report:
    version: str
    generated_utc: str
    root: str
    total_records: int
    scanned: int
    full_read_ok: int
    full_read_failed: int
    open_targets: int
    editable: int
    decompiled_exports: int
    binary_readable_exports: int
    import_queue_items: int
    recompile_queue_items: int
    blocked_binary_roundtrip: int
    new_script_templates: int
    native_hit_count: int
    bridge_ready_hit_count: int
    warnings: list[str]
    outputs: dict[str, str]
    state_counts: dict[str, int]
    records: list[PipelineRecord]


def utc_now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(timespec="seconds").replace("+00:00", "Z")


def sha1_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha1(data).hexdigest()


def safe_rel(path: Path, root: Path) -> str:
    try:
        return path.resolve().relative_to(root.resolve()).as_posix()
    except Exception:
        return path.as_posix()


def sanitize_rel(rel: str) -> str:
    rel = rel.replace("\\", "/").lstrip("/")
    parts = [SAFE_NAME_RE.sub("_", part) or "_" for part in rel.split("/") if part not in {"", ".", ".."}]
    return "/".join(parts) if parts else "unnamed"


def read_json(path: Path, fallback):
    try:
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        return fallback


def run_tool(root: Path, rel_tool: Path, timeout: int = 180) -> tuple[int, str]:
    if not (root / rel_tool).exists():
        return 2, f"missing tool: {rel_tool}"
    proc = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, str(root / rel_tool), "--root", str(root)],
        cwd=str(root),
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        timeout=timeout,
        check=False,
    )
    return proc.returncode, "\n".join(part.strip() for part in (proc.stdout, proc.stderr) if part and part.strip())


def ensure_base_manifests(root: Path, refresh: bool, warnings: list[str]) -> None:
    if refresh or not (root / DECODE_MANIFEST).exists():
        code, output = run_tool(root, DECODE_TOOL, timeout=180)
        if code != 0:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Script Workshop decode refresh failed: {output or code}")
    if refresh or not (root / COMPILE_MANIFEST).exists():
        code, output = run_tool(root, COMPILE_PREP_TOOL, timeout=180)
        if code != 0:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Script Workshop compile prep refresh failed: {output or code}")


def native_maps(root: Path) -> tuple[set[str], set[str]]:
    db = read_json(root / NATIVE_DB, {})
    native_names: set[str] = set()
    for rec in db.get("records", []) if isinstance(db, dict) else []:
        name = str(rec.get("name") or "").strip().upper()
        if name:
            native_names.add(name)
    bridge = read_json(root / BRIDGE_MANIFEST, {})
    bridge_ready: set[str] = set()
    for rec in bridge.get("entries", []) if isinstance(bridge, dict) else []:
        if str(rec.get("status") or "").lower() == "ready":
            name = str(rec.get("name") or "").strip().upper()
            if name:
                bridge_ready.add(name)
    return native_names, bridge_ready


def extract_text_dependencies(text: str, native_names: set[str]) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
    tokens = sorted({tok for tok in UPPER_TOKEN_RE.findall(text) if tok in native_names})
    hashes = sorted(set(h.upper() for h in HASH_RE.findall(text)))
    return tokens, hashes


def extract_binary_strings(data: bytes, limit: int = 200) -> list[str]:
    out = []
    for raw in ASCII_STRING_RE.findall(data):
        try:
            text = raw.decode("ascii", errors="ignore").strip()
        except Exception:
            continue
        if text and text not in out:
            out.append(text)
        if len(out) >= limit:
            break
    return out


def write_text(path: Path, text: str) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")


def copy_bytes(path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_bytes(data)


def write_open_helpers(root: Path, pipeline: Path) -> dict[str, Path]:
    open_bat = pipeline / "open_script_workshop.bat"
    open_bat.write_text(
        "@echo off\r\n"
        "setlocal\r\n"
        "echo Opening Code RED Script Workshop folders...\r\n"
        "if exist edit_workspace start \"CodeRED Script Edit Workspace\" edit_workspace\r\n"
        "if exist decompiled_export start \"CodeRED Decompiled Export\" decompiled_export\r\n"
        "if exist import_queue start \"CodeRED Import Queue\" import_queue\r\n"
        "if exist SCRIPT_PIPELINE_GUIDE.md start \"\" SCRIPT_PIPELINE_GUIDE.md\r\n"
        "endlocal\r\n",
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    guide = pipeline / "SCRIPT_PIPELINE_GUIDE.md"
    write_text(guide,
        "# Code RED Script Pipeline Guide\n\n"
        "Workflow target:\n\n"
        "```text\nscan -> read -> open -> edit -> export decompiled/readable -> import/recompile queue\n```\n\n"
        "## Safe folders\n\n"
        "- `scan_index/` - script inventory and state tables.\n"
        "- `read_full/` - full read copies/reports for every indexed script item.\n"
        "- `edit_workspace/` - safe editable source/text copies.\n"
        "- `decompiled_export/` - source decompiled exports and binary readable reports.\n"
        "- `import_queue/` - edited files staged for import/recompile decisions.\n"
        "- `recompile_queue/` - source candidates and Windows recompile helper.\n"
        "- `new_script_templates/` - starter scripts for adding new Script Workshop entries.\n\n"
        "Compiled `.wsc`, `.csc`, `.xsc`, `.sco`, and `.ysc` binaries remain read-only until real bytecode/compiler roundtrip proof exists.\n",
    )
    return {"open_bat": open_bat, "guide": guide}


def make_new_script_templates(root: Path, pipeline: Path) -> list[Path]:
    template_root = pipeline / "new_script_templates"
    c_template = template_root / "codered_new_script_template.c"
    h_template = template_root / "codered_new_script_template.h"
    readme = template_root / "README_NEW_SCRIPTS.md"
    write_text(h_template,
        "#pragma once\n\n"
        "/* Code RED new script template header.\n"
        "   Keep new scripts source-first until Windows compile proof passes. */\n\n"
        "void CodeRED_NewScript_Tick(void);\n",
    )
    write_text(c_template,
        "#include \"codered_new_script_template.h\"\n\n"
        "/* Code RED new script template.\n"
        "   Add native includes only after the Native Database / Bridge lane marks them covered. */\n\n"
        "void CodeRED_NewScript_Tick(void)\n"
        "{\n"
        "    /* TODO: add safe source-level behavior here. */\n"
        "}\n",
    )
    write_text(readme,
        "# Adding New Scripts\n\n"
        "1. Copy `codered_new_script_template.c/.h` into `edit_workspace/` or your Script Lab source folder.\n"
        "2. Run `tools/codered_script_pipeline.py --refresh` again.\n"
        "3. Check native dependency coverage before compiling.\n"
        "4. Use the Windows recompile helper only after Script Compile Lab validation passes.\n",
    )
    return [c_template, h_template, readme]


def build_pipeline(root: Path, refresh: bool) -> Report:
    warnings: list[str] = []
    ensure_base_manifests(root, refresh, warnings)
    decode_manifest = read_json(root / DECODE_MANIFEST, [])
    compile_manifest = read_json(root / COMPILE_MANIFEST, [])
    if not isinstance(decode_manifest, list) or not decode_manifest:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing/empty decode manifest: {DECODE_MANIFEST}")
    compile_by_path = {str(r.get("path") or ""): r for r in compile_manifest if isinstance(r, dict)} if isinstance(compile_manifest, list) else {}
    native_names, bridge_ready = native_maps(root)

    pipeline = root / PIPELINE_ROOT
    if pipeline.exists():
        shutil.rmtree(pipeline)
    for sub in ("scan_index", "read_full", "open_queue", "edit_workspace", "decompiled_export", "import_queue", "recompile_queue", "raw_binary", "logs"):
        (pipeline / sub).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    helpers = write_open_helpers(root, pipeline)
    templates = make_new_script_templates(root, pipeline)

    records: list[PipelineRecord] = []
    import_rows = []
    recompile_rows = []
    full_read_ok = 0
    full_read_failed = 0
    decompiled_exports = 0
    binary_exports = 0
    blocked_binary = 0
    bridge_ready_hits_all: set[str] = set()
    native_hits_all: set[str] = set()

    for row in decode_manifest:
        if not isinstance(row, dict):
            continue
        original_rel = str(row.get("path") or "").replace("\\", "/").lstrip("/")
        rel = original_rel
        safe_rel_name = sanitize_rel(original_rel)
        if not rel:
            continue
        src = root / rel
        suffix = str(row.get("suffix") or src.suffix).lower()
        warnings_for_record: list[str] = []
        data = b""
        sha1 = str(row.get("sha1") or "")
        size = int(row.get("size") or 0)
        if src.exists():
            try:
                data = src.read_bytes()
                full_read_ok += 1
                sha1 = sha1 or sha1_bytes(data)
                size = len(data)
            except Exception as exc:
                full_read_failed += 1
                warnings_for_record.append(f"full read failed: {exc}")
        else:
            full_read_failed += 1
            warnings_for_record.append("source file missing")

        safe_path = safe_rel_name.replace("/", "__")
        read_export = ""
        raw_export = ""
        edit_copy = ""
        decomp_export = ""
        open_target = ""
        import_state = "inspect_only"
        recompile_state = "not_compile_candidate"
        native_hits: list[str] = []
        hash_hits: list[str] = []
        strings_preview: list[str] = []
        compile_row = compile_by_path.get(rel, {})
        compile_state = str(compile_row.get("compile_state") or "")
        edit_state = str(compile_row.get("edit_state") or "")

        if suffix in TEXT_SUFFIXES and data:
            text = data.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
            native_hits, hash_hits = extract_text_dependencies(text, native_names)
            native_hits_all.update(native_hits)
            bridge_ready_hits_all.update([n for n in native_hits if n in bridge_ready])
            read_path = pipeline / "read_full" / f"{safe_path}.fullread.txt"
            write_text(read_path, text)
            read_export = safe_rel(read_path, root)
            decomp_path = pipeline / "decompiled_export" / f"{safe_path}.decompiled.txt"
            write_text(decomp_path,
                "# Code RED Decompiled Source Export\n"
                f"# Source: {rel}\n"
                f"# SHA1: {sha1}\n"
                f"# Export type: source/text copy\n\n" + text,
            )
            decomp_export = safe_rel(decomp_path, root)
            decompiled_exports += 1
            if str(row.get("editable") or "").lower() in {"true", "1", "yes"} or edit_state == "safe_edit_copy" or suffix in TEXT_SUFFIXES:
                edit_path = pipeline / "edit_workspace" / rel
                copy_bytes(edit_path, data)
                edit_copy = safe_rel(edit_path, root)
                open_target = edit_copy
                import_path = pipeline / "import_queue" / rel
                copy_bytes(import_path, data)
                import_state = "editable_import_candidate"
                if suffix in SOURCE_SUFFIXES or compile_state == "source_compile_candidate":
                    rec_path = pipeline / "recompile_queue" / rel
                    copy_bytes(rec_path, data)
                    recompile_state = "source_recompile_candidate"
                    recompile_rows.append({"path": rel, "source": safe_rel(rec_path, root), "native_hits": native_hits, "bridge_ready": [n for n in native_hits if n in bridge_ready]})
                import_rows.append({"path": rel, "state": import_state, "edit_copy": edit_copy, "decompiled_export": decomp_export})
        else:
            if data:
                raw_path = pipeline / "raw_binary" / rel
                copy_bytes(raw_path, data)
                raw_export = safe_rel(raw_path, root)
                strings_preview = extract_binary_strings(data, limit=80)
                text_blob = "\n".join(strings_preview)
                native_hits, hash_hits = extract_text_dependencies(text_blob, native_names)
                native_hits_all.update(native_hits)
                bridge_ready_hits_all.update([n for n in native_hits if n in bridge_ready])
                report_path = pipeline / "decompiled_export" / f"{safe_path}.readable_export.txt"
                write_text(report_path,
                    "# Code RED Compiled Script Readable Export\n\n"
                    f"Source: {rel}\n"
                    f"Suffix: {suffix}\n"
                    f"Size: {size}\n"
                    f"SHA1: {sha1}\n"
                    "Export type: binary-readable metadata/string/native report, not proven bytecode decompile.\n"
                    "Roundtrip state: blocked until compiler/decompiler proof passes.\n\n"
                    f"Native hits: {', '.join(native_hits) if native_hits else 'none'}\n"
                    f"Hash hits: {', '.join(hash_hits) if hash_hits else 'none'}\n\n"
                    "## String preview\n\n" + "\n".join(f"- {s}" for s in strings_preview[:80]) + "\n",
                )
                read_export = safe_rel(report_path, root)
                decomp_export = read_export
                binary_exports += 1
                blocked_binary += 1 if suffix in COMPILED_SUFFIXES else 0
                import_state = "binary_roundtrip_blocked" if suffix in COMPILED_SUFFIXES else "binary_inspect_only"
                recompile_state = "blocked_until_real_bytecode_roundtrip" if suffix in COMPILED_SUFFIXES else "not_compile_candidate"
                open_target = read_export
            else:
                warnings_for_record.append("no readable bytes exported")

        pipeline_state = "editable_source_pipeline" if import_state == "editable_import_candidate" else ("compiled_binary_readable_only" if suffix in COMPILED_SUFFIXES else "inspect_only")
        for warning in warnings_for_record:
            warnings.append(f"{rel}: {warning}")
        records.append(PipelineRecord(
            path=rel,
            suffix=suffix,
            size=size,
            sha1=sha1,
            pipeline_state=pipeline_state,
            read_export=read_export,
            raw_export=raw_export,
            open_target=open_target,
            edit_copy=edit_copy,
            decompiled_export=decomp_export,
            import_queue_state=import_state,
            recompile_queue_state=recompile_state,
            native_hits=sorted(native_hits),
            hash_hits=sorted(set(hash_hits)),
            strings_preview=strings_preview[:25],
            warnings=warnings_for_record,
        ))

    # scan/index manifests
    scan_json = pipeline / "scan_index" / "script_pipeline_scan_index.json"
    scan_csv = pipeline / "scan_index" / "script_pipeline_scan_index.csv"
    write_text(scan_json, json.dumps([asdict(r) for r in records], indent=2))
    with scan_csv.open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        fields = ["path", "suffix", "pipeline_state", "read_export", "edit_copy", "decompiled_export", "import_queue_state", "recompile_queue_state", "native_hits", "warnings"]
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fields)
        writer.writeheader()
        for rec in records:
            row = asdict(rec)
            writer.writerow({k: "|".join(row[k]) if isinstance(row.get(k), list) else row.get(k, "") for k in fields})

    import_manifest = pipeline / "import_queue" / "IMPORT_QUEUE.json"
    recompile_manifest = pipeline / "recompile_queue" / "RECOMPILE_QUEUE.json"
    write_text(import_manifest, json.dumps(import_rows, indent=2))
    write_text(recompile_manifest, json.dumps(recompile_rows, indent=2))
    helper = pipeline / "recompile_queue" / "run_import_recompile_probe.bat"
    helper.write_text(
        "@echo off\r\n"
        "setlocal\r\n"
        "echo Code RED Script Import/Recompile Probe\r\n"
        "echo This helper does not overwrite archives. It validates source candidates only.\r\n"
        "echo.\r\n"
        "if not exist RECOMPILE_QUEUE.json (\r\n"
        "  echo [ERROR] RECOMPILE_QUEUE.json missing. Re-run tools\\codered_script_pipeline.py.\r\n"
        "  exit /b 1\r\n"
        ")\r\n"
        "echo Review RECOMPILE_QUEUE.json and Script Compile Lab validation before adding compiler commands.\r\n"
        "echo Proof output target: ..\\..\\logs\\CodeRED_Script_Import_Recompile_Proof.txt\r\n"
        "endlocal\r\n",
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    outputs = {
        "pipeline_root": PIPELINE_ROOT.as_posix(),
        "scan_index_json": safe_rel(scan_json, root),
        "scan_index_csv": safe_rel(scan_csv, root),
        "open_helper": safe_rel(helpers["open_bat"], root),
        "guide": safe_rel(helpers["guide"], root),
        "import_queue": safe_rel(import_manifest, root),
        "recompile_queue": safe_rel(recompile_manifest, root),
        "recompile_helper": safe_rel(helper, root),
        "report_json": REPORT_JSON.as_posix(),
        "report_md": REPORT_MD.as_posix(),
        "pipeline_manifest_json": PIPELINE_MANIFEST_JSON.as_posix(),
        "pipeline_manifest_csv": PIPELINE_MANIFEST_CSV.as_posix(),
        "capabilities": CAPABILITIES_JSON.as_posix(),
    }
    state_counts = Counter(r.pipeline_state for r in records)
    report = Report(
        version=VERSION,
        generated_utc=utc_now(),
        root=str(root),
        total_records=len(records),
        scanned=len(records),
        full_read_ok=full_read_ok,
        full_read_failed=full_read_failed,
        open_targets=sum(1 for r in records if r.open_target),
        editable=sum(1 for r in records if r.edit_copy),
        decompiled_exports=decompiled_exports,
        binary_readable_exports=binary_exports,
        import_queue_items=len(import_rows),
        recompile_queue_items=len(recompile_rows),
        blocked_binary_roundtrip=blocked_binary,
        new_script_templates=len(templates),
        native_hit_count=len(native_hits_all),
        bridge_ready_hit_count=len(bridge_ready_hits_all),
        warnings=warnings,
        outputs=outputs,
        state_counts=dict(sorted(state_counts.items())),
        records=records,
    )
    return report


def write_report(root: Path, report: Report) -> None:
    payload = asdict(report)
    (root / REPORT_JSON).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (root / PIPELINE_MANIFEST_JSON).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    write_text(root / REPORT_JSON, json.dumps(payload, indent=2))
    write_text(root / PIPELINE_MANIFEST_JSON, json.dumps([asdict(r) for r in report.records], indent=2))
    with (root / PIPELINE_MANIFEST_CSV).open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        fields = ["path", "suffix", "pipeline_state", "read_export", "raw_export", "open_target", "edit_copy", "decompiled_export", "import_queue_state", "recompile_queue_state", "native_hits", "hash_hits", "warnings"]
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fields)
        writer.writeheader()
        for rec in report.records:
            row = asdict(rec)
            writer.writerow({k: "|".join(row[k]) if isinstance(row.get(k), list) else row.get(k, "") for k in fields})
    caps = {
        "version": VERSION,
        "generated_utc": report.generated_utc,
        "workflow": ["scan", "read", "open", "edit", "export_decompiled_or_readable", "import_queue", "recompile_queue"],
        "ready_now": [
            "full script scan",
            "full source/text read",
            "safe open targets",
            "safe edit workspace",
            "source/text decompiled exports",
            "compiled binary raw exports",
            "compiled binary readable string/native reports",
            "source import queue",
            "source recompile queue",
            "new script templates",
        ],
        "blocked_until_proof": [
            "semantic bytecode decompile",
            "compiled binary recompile from pseudo-decompiled report",
            "automatic archive reintegration",
            "live game script install",
        ],
        "outputs": report.outputs,
    }
    write_text(root / CAPABILITIES_JSON, json.dumps(caps, indent=2))
    lines = [
        "# Code RED Script Pipeline Report",
        "",
        f"Generated: {report.generated_utc}",
        f"Version: `{report.version}`",
        "",
        "## Workflow",
        "",
        "`scan -> read -> open -> edit -> export decompiled/readable -> import/recompile queue`",
        "",
        "## Summary",
        "",
        f"- Records scanned: `{report.scanned}`",
        f"- Full reads OK: `{report.full_read_ok}`",
        f"- Full reads failed: `{report.full_read_failed}`",
        f"- Open targets: `{report.open_targets}`",
        f"- Editable safe copies: `{report.editable}`",
        f"- Source/text decompiled exports: `{report.decompiled_exports}`",
        f"- Binary readable exports: `{report.binary_readable_exports}`",
        f"- Import queue items: `{report.import_queue_items}`",
        f"- Recompile queue items: `{report.recompile_queue_items}`",
        f"- Blocked compiled-binary roundtrip items: `{report.blocked_binary_roundtrip}`",
        f"- New script templates: `{report.new_script_templates}`",
        f"- Native hits: `{report.native_hit_count}`",
        f"- Bridge-ready native hits: `{report.bridge_ready_hit_count}`",
        f"- Warnings: `{len(report.warnings)}`",
        "",
        "## State Counts",
        "",
    ]
    for key, value in sorted(report.state_counts.items()):
        lines.append(f"- `{key}`: `{value}`")
    lines.extend(["", "## Outputs", ""])
    for key, value in report.outputs.items():
        lines.append(f"- {key}: `{value}`")
    lines.extend([
        "",
        "## Safety",
        "",
        "Compiled script binaries are fully read and exported, but binary bytecode roundtrip remains locked until a real compiler/decompiler proof exists.",
        "Source/text files can be edited through safe copies and staged into import/recompile queues.",
    ])
    if report.warnings:
        lines.extend(["", "## Warnings", ""])
        for warning in report.warnings[:100]:
            lines.append(f"- {warning}")
    write_text(root / REPORT_MD, "\n".join(lines) + "\n")
    write_text(root / PASS_LOG,
        "# Code RED Script Pipeline Lane Pass\n\n"
        f"Date: 2026-05-03\n\n"
        "## Result\n\n"
        "The Script Workshop now has a complete safe pipeline for scan, read, open, edit, decompiled/readable export, import queue, recompile queue, and new script templates.\n\n"
        "Compiled binary roundtrip remains proof-gated.\n",
    )


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Build the full Code RED Script Pipeline workflow.")
    p.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Code RED root")
    p.add_argument("--refresh", action="store_true", help="Re-run decode and compile-prep manifests first")
    return p


def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
    args = build_parser().parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)
    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    report = build_pipeline(root, refresh=args.refresh)
    write_report(root, report)
    if report.full_read_failed or any("failed" in w.lower() for w in report.warnings):
        print("Script pipeline: PARTIAL")
    else:
        print("Script pipeline: PASS")
    print(f"Scanned: {report.scanned}")
    print(f"Full reads: {report.full_read_ok}/{report.scanned}")
    print(f"Editable: {report.editable}")
    print(f"Decompiled/source exports: {report.decompiled_exports}")
    print(f"Binary readable exports: {report.binary_readable_exports}")
    print(f"Import queue: {report.import_queue_items}")
    print(f"Recompile queue: {report.recompile_queue_items}")
    print(f"Blocked binary roundtrip: {report.blocked_binary_roundtrip}")
    print(f"Report: {root / REPORT_MD}")
    return 0 if report.full_read_failed == 0 else 2


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
